name: Irish Potato Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together mashed potatoes, vanilla (or almond extract), and confectioners sugar until well combined.
2. Gradually add the coconut to the mixture and stir until evenly distributed.
3. Form the mixture into small potato shapes, adding more confectioners sugar if needed for firmness.
4. Roll each shape in ground cinnamon to coat evenly.
